# Oversight Framework

Oversight is constitutional authority.

Aegis is subordinate to human command.

---

## Oversight Philosophy

Oversight exists because intelligence scales, impact scales, and risk scales.

Where impact increases, governance must increase.

---

## Oversight Roles

Oversight includes:

- Threat escalation approval
- Isolation authorization
- Administrative governance changes
- Version updates
- Protocol modification

Oversight may override governance.  
Governance may override execution.  
Execution may not override governance or oversight.

---

## Dual-Control Model

For elevated threat levels, dual-approval is required.

Separation of duties is a well-established control to reduce abuse of authorized privileges without collusion.[^1]

---

## Oversight by Threat Level

| Level | Oversight Requirement |
|-------|------------------------|
| 0–1   | Operator review        |
| 2     | Explicit authorization |
| 3     | Escalation approval + monitoring |
| 4     | Dual control           |
| 5     | Detached execution + operator presence |

---

## Constitutional Safeguard

No system may self-authorize escalation.

Authority is always external to execution.

[^1]: See [R09](references.html#r09-nist-sp-800-53-rev-5-separation-of-duties-ac-5).
